metadata.description: Kanban board for Trade-In Processing Workflow with Approval. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Trade-In Processing Workflow with Approval
tasks.description: Create complete trade-in workflow from item entry through condition assessment, valuation, approval (if needed), to inventory addition.
tasks.userStory: As a store employee, I want a simple workflow to process trade-ins with automated pricing so that I can handle trade-ins quickly without needing extensive product knowledge.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a trade-in is initiated, when employee enters item details, then system searches for item and fetches market price
Given item is found, when condition is assessed and entered, then system calculates trade-in value based on condition
Given trade-in value, when value exceeds approval threshold (e.g., $500), then approval workflow is triggered requiring Manager/Owner approval
Given trade-in is approved, when employee accepts trade-in, then items are automatically added to inventory and customer account is credited
Given trade-in workflow, when processing, then each step is clearly indicated with progress indicator
Given trade-in is completed, when finished, then trade-in record is saved with all details for reporting and audit
Given trade-in can be cancelled, when cancelled before completion, then no inventory changes occur and workflow is terminated
tasks.businessValue: Streamlines trade-in process, reducing time per transaction and enabling employees to process trade-ins efficiently.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create TradeIn table to track trade-ins. Implement state machine for workflow. Integrate with inventory system for auto-add. Create approval workflow with notifications.
successMetrics: Time saved: 50% reduction in time per trade-in transaction
Trade-in processing: 90%+ of trade-ins processed without errors
Approval workflow: 100% of high-value trade-ins go through approval
businessRules: Trade-in approval required for values exceeding $500 (configurable)
Only Manager or Owner roles can approve trade-ins
Trade-in items are automatically added to inventory upon acceptance
Trade-in records must include: items, values, customer, employee, timestamp
Trade-in can be cancelled before final acceptance
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
